title: Software Developer
description:
Role Overview

The Software Developer will be responsible for integrating passport readers and multimodal biometric devices—including fingerprint, face, and iris modules—into our application platforms or API. The role requires working with manufacturer‑provided and third‑party SDKs to develop robust, scalable, and secure software solutions that meet both customer requirements and internal engineering standards.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop application modules using backend SDKs for passport readers, fingerprint sensors, cameras, iris scanners, and other identity‑related devices.
  • Design and implement software solutions by analyzing system workflows, data usage, and user requirements, following the full Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
  • Provide engineering support during solution build, deployment, configuration, and system integration for customer projects.
  • Investigate, troubleshoot, and resolve software issues, ensuring timely and professional response to bug reports.
  • Conduct software testing to ensure logical accuracy, output validity, and overall performance.
  • Collaborate with Internal Sales & Operations, and liaising with Engineering from manufacturers on standardization, scalability, and product enhancement initiatives.
  • Prepare comprehensive documentation such as flowcharts, diagrams, technical specifications, and well‑commented code.
  • Perform system analysis and recommend improvements to enhance operational efficiency.
  • Research and propose technology upgrades, enhancements, and process improvements.
  • Develop customer‑specific applications and ensure all deliverables are fully validated and optimized.
  • Ensure timely completion of assigned tasks and deliver high‑quality, accurate output.

Qualifications & Skills

  • Proficiency in one or more programming languages: .NET, Java, C, C++.
  • Experience with WinSockets and modern programming technologies is an advantage.
  • Strong experience integrating hardware devices using manufacturer or third‑party SDKs.
  • Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, and problem‑solving skills.
  • Strong written documentation skills and attention to detail.
  • Ability to work independently and meet project deadlines.

Additional Information

  • Experience with biometric systems or identity management technologies is highly advantageous.
  • Opportunity to work with leading technologies in identity verification and border security applications.

districts.location: D15 Katong, Joo Chiat, Amber Road
